methodsAttempted.query: QS 331-380 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search and targeted official page extraction were used. Course pages, theses, research PDFs, generic AI literacy pages, and non-official tool examples were not expanded into allowed tool records.

artifacts.summary: QS331-380 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for Mahidol University and University of Kent. Other schools in the band were not expanded without explicit public tool-level official evidence.

targets.sourceTitle: AI and copyright - University of Kent
AI Tools for Research - Mahidol University Library and Knowledge Center

stopConditions: Stop after official source-backed tool-level evidence is captured.
Do not expand broad AI guidance, course policies, theses, research PDFs, training pages, or generic examples into named tool availability records.

artifacts.title: QS331-380 AI tools crawl report
artifacts.summary: Staged QS331-380 official AI tools records and left universities without explicit tool-level official evidence unexpanded.
limitations: Tool records are tracker-derived metadata and do not replace official university source language.
The pass only expands official public tool-level evidence, not broad AI guidance, training examples, course policies, theses, or generic tool mentions.
